projects.title: BO-AT autonomous transport
projects.description: For my senior design project at BU, Our team has created an autonomous sailboat to conquer long range ocean research missions.

image.alt: Autonomous sailboat design and CAD model

projects.title: Lightsaber Stand
projects.description: This is a lightsaber stand I designed and 3D printed to hold a lightsaber for my friend Jono. I designed the CAD using onshape and printed it on the bambu labs printers in the EPIC lab at school.

projects.title: Minecraft Server Monitor
projects.description: Want to check if your friends are online without booting up the game and facing disappointment? My Minecraft Server Monitor allows you to continuously check the status of any Minecraft server and display live player info
